text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Another long-fought and fearsome trial 
overcome, I entered act two of my Prelude 
to Glory…

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh my, if it isn't Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Impeccable timing. I was just giving a live 
rendition of The Legend of T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Worry not, I still have three hundred 
pages to go! There's still plenty of 
scenes for you to enjoy!
